title: Implement isNovel() duplicate detection filter
description:
**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] isNovel(repoRoot, insight) checks for duplicates
- [ ] Uses keyword search to find similar existing lessons
- [ ] Returns false if highly similar lesson exists

close_reason: isNovel() duplicate detection complete: keyword search + Jaccard similarity - 6 tests passing (105 total)

title: Implement isSpecific() vagueness filter

title: Initialize pnpm project with TypeScript, tsup, and Vitest
description:
**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] pnpm project initialized with package.json
- [ ] TypeScript configured (tsconfig.json with strict mode, ESM)
- [ ] tsup configured for build (tsup.config.ts)
- [ ] Vitest integrated (vitest.config.ts)
- [ ] package.json has bin entries for CLI
- [ ] `pnpm build` produces dist/index.js and dist/cli.js
- [ ] `pnpm test` runs (even with no tests)

**TDD Notes:**
- Write config file tests first (verify structure)
- Test build output exists
close_reason: Project setup complete: pnpm, TypeScript, tsup, Vitest all configured and working

title: Implement self-correction and test-failure triggers

title: Export public API via index.ts + hook documentation
description:
**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] src/index.ts exports all public functions
- [ ] Storage: appendLesson, readLessons, rebuildIndex, searchKeyword
- [ ] Embeddings: embedText, embedTexts
- [ ] Search: searchVector, rankLessons
- [ ] Capture: shouldPropose, detect* functions
- [ ] Types: Lesson, QuickLesson, FullLesson
- [ ] Hook integration examples documented

**Files:** src/index.ts
**Blocked by:** TRIGGERS-AUTO, SESSION-LOAD, PLAN-RETRIEVAL

title: Implement multi-factor lesson ranking system
description:
**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Severity boost: high=1.5, medium=1.0, low=0.8
- [ ] Recency boost: 1.2 for lessons ≤30 days old, 1.0 otherwise
- [ ] Confirmation boost: 1.3 for confirmed lessons
- [ ] rankLessons(lessons, options) returns sorted by combined score
- [ ] Score formula: vector_similarity * severity * recency * confirmation

**Files:** src/search/ranking.ts
**Blocked by:** Week 1 CLI (all Week 1 complete)
close_reason: Multi-factor ranking complete: severityBoost, recencyBoost, confirmationBoost, calculateScore, rankLessons - 14 tests passing (99 total)

title: Implement JSONL storage layer (append, read, tombstones)
description:
**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] appendLesson(repoRoot, lesson) atomically writes to .claude/lessons/index.jsonl
- [ ] readLessons(repoRoot) streams file and returns non-deleted lessons
- [ ] Tombstone records (deleted=true) filter out lessons
- [ ] Last-write-wins deduplication by ID
- [ ] Creates directory structure if missing

**Files:** src/storage/jsonl.ts
**Blocked by:** TYPES
close_reason: JSONL storage complete: appendLesson, readLessons with tombstones and deduplication - 11 tests passing
